description: Style NoteTo all fashion forward guys - your search is over! Jack & Jones is here, just waiting to provide you with all the stylish gear you need to create your own JJ look. This is one brand who know all about denim - especially how to get the right Fit that will turn all the girls' heads! If you don't want to have to work hard to look great, then put yourself in Jack and Jones' capable hands.. they're there to guarantee you'll turn heads for all the right reasons. Grinding, whiskering and stonewashing give the pair an edgy look. Pair it with a graphic T-shirt and sneakers for a weekend getaway.Product DetailsIndigo distressed denim jeans, two scoop pockets in front with coin pocket on right, yoke at back,  two patch pockets at back with arquette embroidery, stonewashinged with whiskering and grinding effects, chevrons at back knee,  waistband with loops,  fly with black buttons, all top stitching in ochreMaterials and Care100% cottonHand wash with similar coloursHot ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32â€�) is wearing a size 32For Jack & Jones jeans sizes, first number refers to waist and second number refers to inseam length
